microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing service order workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating dependencies across CE, Supply Chain, and Finance stakeholders.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce **planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly improving operational KPI performance and program throughput.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, delivering in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model with documented BKMs and compliance tracking.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and supporting onboarding and training compliance across teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — mirroring countermeasure and corrective-action tracking expected in CE support environments.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and materials aging across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact actions, and report progress in executive operational reviews.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, managing backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and maintain workforce productivity across cross-functional teams.

Drove cross-functional alignment to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating software deployment cycles by 25%** and reducing manual workflow overhead — directly supporting service order and SOP compliance goals.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM workflow that improved service order accuracy and scheduling coordination.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to drive measurable customer satisfaction outcomes.
